objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 3 TypeScript import/export resolution with resolved cross-file call edges and regression tests

evaluator.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when TypeScript check, tests proving relative import resolution, imported call edges resolve to real symbol IDs, impact analysis includes cross-file callers, trace_flow crosses file boundaries, and production build pass

lastValidation.evidence: Implemented Phase 3 TypeScript import/export resolution: AST import edges now carry named/default bindings; topology import resolver supports relative imports and index files; export index maps exported symbols; symbol resolver upgrades import edges to target file symbols and imported call edges to real exported symbol IDs with targetFile/resolution metadata; traceFlow and ContextPack topology expose targetFile. Regression tests cover relative index import resolution, alias imported call resolution, impact_analysis cross-file callers, trace_flow targetFile, and context topology target files. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
